biography.value: Inferno Sovereigns understand that they are fighting. Immolating Presence costs 2 [Combat] actions on arrival to set conditions; the third action that turn goes into a Magma Fist against the nearest priority target. Subsequent turns spend two actions on Magma Fist or Fire Lance and the third on positioning or a second ranged attack at penalty. Conflagration Aura handles anyone who closes without instruction. A Friendly Inferno Sovereign is a force of nature on the summoner's behalf. Even a Cooperative one works efficiently — its intelligence means instructions land without interpretation errors.

system.attacksNotes:
• Magma Fist [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 5 + Melee Combat 7), Reach: 15 ft
    • Margin 1: 14 damage (Huge, standard: 12 + 2) + 8 fire damage (Half DR)
    • Margin 2: 21 damage (14 + 7 Str) + 8 fire damage; target gains Burning condition; no save
    • Margin 3: 21 damage + 8 fire damage + Burning; target makes Fortitude save (1 success) or gains Stunned until end of their next turn
  • Fire Lance [Combat]: Ranged attack (Dex 4 + Ranged Combat 5), Range: 120 ft
    • Margin 1: 16 fire damage (Half DR); target gains Ignited
    • Margin 2: 24 fire damage; target gains Burning; no save
    • Margin 3: 24 fire damage + Burning; all creatures within 10 feet of target take 8 fire damage (Half DR)
system.specialAbilitiesNotes:
• Conflagration Aura: Creatures starting their turn within 10 feet take 8 fire damage (Half DR). Flammable objects within 10 feet ignite automatically at the start of each round.
  • Immolating Presence (1/encounter) [Combat]: As 2 [Combat] actions, releases a pulse of fire in a 30-foot radius. All creatures in range make a Reflex save. Compare Agi 5 + Melee Combat 7 targeting vs. each save. Net 1: 20 fire damage + Ignited. Net 2: 40 fire damage + Burning. Net 3: 40 fire damage + Burning + Blinded until end of their next turn from the searing flash.
  • Momentum Defense: As above.
  • Resilient Defense (2/day).
